narrative:
Sharonville 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,301 registered voters, with 49.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.6 percentage points.
